name: Brain CPR — fix fire-and-forget DB writes dropped by the Vercel freeze
files: lib/persistence.js (new — safePersist(promise,label) via @vercel/functions waitUntil + await fallback)
lib/memory.js (entity extraction call:336 -> safePersist(..., 'entity') + cron-summarize TODO)
lib/conjecture-memory.js (recordOutcome now returns an awaitable, never-rejecting promise + logs +1)
lib/loop.js (both cron recordOutcome calls AWAITED; comment: outcomes stay near-0 until Lean leaves = Build B)
tests/BRAINCPR_LIVE_TEST.md (new — post-deploy chat tests + Supabase row-count checks)

the_dead_four.m8_entities + m8_entity_mentions: memory.js:336 _maybeExtractEntities -> waitUntil (was fire-and-forget .catch). Core insert+mention covered; the optional summary UPDATE stays best-effort (council follow-up = move heavy extract to cron-summarize)
the_dead_four.m8_conjecture_outcomes: loop.js recordOutcome x2 -> await (cron, latency-insensitive). Stays near-0 until the Lean/M4 lane produces verified/sorry leaves (Build B).

design.in_chat_writes: Vercel waitUntil — response returns immediately (no 2-4s TTFB hit to the voice-first UX), lambda stays alive to flush.
design.cron_writes: plain await — latency-insensitive, handler awaited by Vercel, guarantees flush.
design.safety: safePersist never throws; wrapped promise never rejects; degrades to await if @vercel/functions absent or no request context.
design.instrumentation: each insert resolve logs '[persist:<label>] +1'; Supabase {error} logged on failure.
design.reflector_scope: UNCHANGED + verified: orchestrator reflectEligible already gates the reflector to general+knowledge lanes (excludes compute/lean/lemmaDag/fleet/finance/eosb/state/company/notebook/graph/loop/research/image). It does NOT gate or rewrite engine/compute/fleet turns. Asserted by the PS mirror.

tests_passed: 38/38 (tests/BRAINCPR-verify.ps1, PowerShell static mirror — host has no Node)

verification.static_review: all 4 write sites + scope guard reviewed; no bare fire-and-forget remains; no other write path to the 4 tables (grep-confirmed)
verification.preview_build: PENDING — pushing the branch triggers a Vercel PREVIEW build; proves it still bundles at 10 functions (no api/ function added) and @vercel/functions imports cleanly

not_touched: Bolt fleet sync (separate MHMBOLT repo), morning brief (morning-brief.js/notify.js/nudges.js/fleet*.js), memory-summarize cron behavior, the 4 cron schedules. No api/ function added (stays under the 12-fn Hobby cap). Parallel fun-session files (BUILD_LOG.md, NEXT_SESSION_BRIEF.md, m8_records.html, TEAM_*) NOT staged.
deploy_checklist: 1. Confirm green Vercel PREVIEW build on branch fix/brain-cpr (10 functions, no @vercel/functions import error).
2. Muhammad says 'deploy' -> merge fix/brain-cpr to main (or promote the preview).
3. Run tests/BRAINCPR_LIVE_TEST.md sections 1-3 in live chat; confirm m8_reflections / m8_reasoning_chains / m8_entity_mentions go 0 -> >0.
5. m8_conjecture_outcomes stays near-0 until Build B (Lean leaves) — that's expected; just confirm the +1 log fires after a qualifying cron-verify.
6. If +1 logs appear but rows don't: verify Fluid Compute is ON and the table migrations are applied (esp. B92_conjecture_outcomes.sql).
next: Build B — make the Lean/M4 lane actually produce verified/sorry leaves so m8_conjecture_outcomes climbs; then the council follow-up to move heavy Gemini entity extraction into cron-summarize.
